title: coleus elliotii
intro: Coleus elliotii, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and cold due to its antipyretic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in various health benefits, including its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and aid in the management of diabetes. Coleus elliotii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and it is also used in traditional cooking and as a spice to add flavor and aroma.
